text: - ix. No Limitation. Nothing in this Section shall be construed as limiting in any way the extent to which Contractor or any Subcontractor of any tier may be held responsible for payment of damages resulting from their operations. Contractor's obligations to procure insurance are separate and independent of,  and  shall  not  limit  Contractor's  contractual  indemnity  and  defense obligations.  Owner does not represent that coverages and limits required in this Contract will necessarily be adequate to protect Contractor.
